hero.subtitulo: Artisanal pastry and signature cuisine in the heart of the city. A gastronomic experience that awakens all the senses.

about.parrafo1: Founded in 2015 by chef María Elena Torres and her husband Carlos, Delicias & Sabores was born from the dream of creating a space where artisanal pastry and signature cuisine merge into a unique gastronomic experience.
about.parrafo2: With over 20 years of experience in fine pastry and international cuisine, María Elena has created a menu that changes with the seasons, using fresh ingredients from local producers and cutting-edge techniques that surprise even the most demanding palate.

sellos.frescosDesc: We select the best ingredients from local and seasonal producers.
sellos.ambienteDesc: An elegantly designed space to create unforgettable moments.
sellos.atencionDesc: Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional service to every guest.

menu.subtitulo: A carefully curated selection to awaken your senses

gallery.subtitulo: Discover the unique atmosphere of our space through these images

reservations.subtitulo: Fill out the form and we'll save your reservation
reservations.confirmadoMsg: Your reservation has been saved successfully. We look forward to seeing you!
reservations.terminos: By reserving, you accept our terms and conditions. Your data is stored locally in your browser.
reservations.fechaFutura: Date must be today or later
reservations.minNombre: Name must be at least 2 characters

contact.subtitulo: We are in the heart of the city. Book your experience or just stop by to say hello.
contact.notaHorarios: * Continuous kitchen service. Last order 30 min before closing.
contact.cocinaUltimo: * Continuous kitchen service. Last order 30 min before closing.

footer.descripcion: Luxury Restaurant & Confectionery. Artisanal pastry and signature cuisine in the heart of Buenos Aires.
footer.newsletterDesc: Receive our news and exclusive promotions.

reviews.subtitulo: The opinion of those who visit us is our best business card
